chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1963. Proof of the Generation Rule for the Stability Constraints in Linear Discrete Systems (M39) by E.I. Jury. A memo on Marden's Investigations of the Zero-Distribution Within the Unit Circle (M38) by E.I. Jury. A proposed Mechanism for the Broadband Noise in Long Crossed-Field Guns (M37) by T.Van Duzer and R.D. Harris. Notes on magnitude functions with equi-ripple response (M36) by D.A. Calahan. On Channel Capacity (M35) by E. Eisenberg. Sample Trajectory Calculations Using a Digital Computer Program (M34) by J.M. Owens, G. Nirdlinger, N.R. Mantena, R.A. Rao and T.Van Duzer. Solutions to Spherical Anisotropic Antennas (M33) by K.K. Mei and M. Meyer. A Note of the Zero-State Stability of Linear Systems (M32) by C.A. Desoer and A.J. Thomasian. A Note on the Reciprocal Zeros of a Real Polynomial with Respect to the Unit Circle (M31) by E.I. Jury.

Experimental Investigation of Microwave Propagation in a Plasma Wavelength (M30) by R.N. Carlile. The number of Symmetry Types of Post Functions (M29) by Michael A. Harrison. Optimal control with Random Inputs (M28) by Huibert Kwakernaak. Microwave Scatter From a Rough Water Surface (M27) by G.O. Hendry and R.H. Clarke. Stability of Linear, Time-varying Networks From Energy Fuction Analysis (M26) by R.A. Rohrer. Proposal for a Two-Stage Semiconductor Laser Through Tunneling and Injection (M25) by Shyh Wang. Natural Frequencies of Networks Containing Tunnel Diodes (M24) by V.W. Chang and I.T. Frisch. Focusing of an Electron Stream with Radio-Frequency Fields (M23) by C.K. Birdsall and G.W. Rayfield. Third Order, Tunnel-Diode Oscillators (M22) by D.K. Lynn.

A Linear Search Problem (M21) by E. Wong. On an Axis-Crossing Property of Gaussian Noise (M20) by E. Wong. A Census of Finite Automata (M19) by Michael A. Harrison. On the Convergence of a Series of Solution of Certain Nonlinear Difference Equations (M18) by A.G. Dewey. On the Characterization of Continuous Gaussian Processes (M17) by C. Galtieri Galtieri. Linear, Time-Varying Circuits and Multiterminal RC Networks (M16) by Dr. Sidney Darlington. Neural Pulse Frequency Modulated Control Systems (M15) by T. Pavlidis. A Study of Limitations on the Characteristics of Network Functions (M14) by John D. Patterson. Certain Considerations on the Selection of Models for Biological Systems (M13) by T. Pavlidis. Experimental Study of PWM Control Systems (M12) by S.C. Gupta and E.I. Jury. Computed Characteristics of Various Model Cavity-Chain Beam Amplifiers (M11) by R.M. Bevensee.
